metadata_source: local apt-cache binary and source metadata from the Ubuntu 24.04 repositories configured on this system
selection_policy: Representative direct dependents on the libwebp runtime package family (libwebp7, libwebpdecoder3, libwebpdemux2, libwebpmux3) and/or source packages that Build-Depend on libwebp-dev. The list is intentionally diverse rather than exhaustive.
method: Enumerated direct reverse dependencies with apt-cache rdepends against libwebp7, libwebpdecoder3, libwebpdemux2, and libwebpmux3.
Confirmed compile-time use with apt-cache showsrc by checking Build-Depends for libwebp-dev on each selected source package.
Assigned runtime functionality from package descriptions plus the specific libwebp subpackages each runtime package depends on.

dependents.name: GIMP
dependents.runtime_functionality: Opening, editing, and exporting WebP still images and animated WebP content in the raster editor.

dependents.name: Pillow
dependents.runtime_functionality: Lets Python applications read, write, and transform WebP images, including animated WebP sequences.

dependents.name: WebKitGTK
dependents.runtime_functionality: Decoding and rendering WebP images referenced by web pages and other embedded web content, including animated WebP.

dependents.name: Qt 6 Image Formats Plugins
dependents.runtime_functionality: Adds WebP support to Qt 6 image readers and writers used by Qt GUI applications.

dependents.name: SDL2_image
dependents.runtime_functionality: Loads WebP images into SDL surfaces for games and multimedia applications.

dependents.name: libvips
dependents.runtime_functionality: Reads and writes WebP images inside high-throughput image-processing pipelines.

dependents.name: GNU Emacs (GTK build)
dependents.runtime_functionality: Displays WebP images inside GUI Emacs buffers, image-mode views, and other features that rely on Emacs image decoding.

dependents.name: Shotwell
dependents.runtime_functionality: Imports, thumbnails, and displays WebP photos in the GNOME photo organizer.

dependents.name: LibreOffice
dependents.runtime_functionality: Imports and renders WebP images embedded in Writer, Calc, Impress, and Draw documents.

dependents.name: FFmpeg libavcodec
dependents.runtime_functionality: Provides WebP decode and encode support in FFmpeg and other media-processing workflows built on libavcodec.

dependents.name: webp-pixbuf-loader
dependents.runtime_functionality: Adds native WebP preview and loading support to GTK applications through GdkPixbuf.

dependents.name: SAIL codecs
dependents.runtime_functionality: Provides WebP decoding support in the SAIL codec pack used by applications built on the SAIL image library.
